request_payload.exposure_text: I get why some folks worry about civil defense spending, but let's be real - when was the last time our local emergency services had the resources they needed during a crisis? My town's fire department still uses equipment from the 90s. We're talking about basic preparedness here, not some sci-fi doomsday scenario. If we can't trust our own government to handle everyday emergencies, how can we expect them to protect us from real threats? #CommonSense #PublicSafetyFirst
